title: Enchantment Tags
description: Shows Breach or Density on your held mace above the hotbar.
body:
Enchantment Tags is a client-side Fabric mod that shows customizable enchantment tags above the hotbar for your held item.

It is designed to stay clean and readable while still giving you quick information during combat or testing.

Features:
- Shows enchantment tags for your held item above the hotbar
- Supports multiple enchantments at the same time
- Custom text for each enchantment
- Custom colors for each enchantment
- Movable HUD position
- Mod Menu config screen
- Searchable config with grouped enchantment/settings results
- Client-side only

Made for Minecraft 1.21.11 on Fabric.
